race.comment: Big field and some tough draws to overcome. ROYAL GLADIATOR (2) is a speedy type in great form scoring on the turf here fresh then a minor placing last time off a wide draw. Drawn even further out here but has good speed and will prove tough to beat. WARNA (1) is bursting to win with back-to-back placings, the latest when third over 1400m at this track. Has an outside gate but a top chance on best form. VREDEFORT (5) went forward and gave a great sight when second over 1600m at this track last time out. Blinkers added so worth plenty of thought. IHAVESEENTHELIGHT (6) resumed from a long spell with a solid fifth and will be much better for it.
